title: Asset
description: Defines categories for assets, holding default depreciation settings and GL account linkages. Internal Name: assetcat.

AssetAccount.description: The fixed asset account code (FA Type).

GainLoss.description: Account code for gain/loss on asset disposal (IN or EX Type).

Type.description: Default depreciation type: SL (Straight Line) or DV (Diminishing Value).

Impairment.description: An expense account code for asset impairment loss (EX Type).

RevalSurplus.description: An equity account code for revaluation surplus (SF Type).

GainLossPrivate.description: Account code for private portion gain/loss on sale (IN or EX Type).

DepExpensePrivate.description: Account code for private portion depreciation (EX Type).

LastDepreciatedDate.description: Date of last depreciation run for category.

LastModifiedTime.description: Date and time the category record was last changed.

Flags.description: Bitmask for category flags. Includes Private Use Allowed, Calculate Daily Depreciation.
